# RoomieDanmark

RoomieDanmark is a Danish platform for finding rooms, roomies, and shared homes without a contact paywall.

Important pages:
- https://roomiedanmark.dk/vaerelser/
- https://roomiedanmark.dk/studiebolig/
- https://roomiedanmark.dk/find-roomie/
- https://roomiedanmark.dk/udlej-vaerelse/
- https://roomiedanmark.dk/boligovervaagning/
